---
title: "Ann White"
---

## Ann White

**Dates:** (b. Michelmersh  1857/8)

### Description

wife of Thomas White (b. Michelmersh 1851/2), ‘steam ploughman’ and ‘engine driver’

### Biography

She was living at Silkstead, Compton in 1891.

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 26th [after 1884?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
